description.value:
Seeker

The Seeker is an investigator, a tracker, and a finder of hidden truths. They possess a keen eye for detail, a talent for reading people, and the social skills necessary to extract information from unwilling sources. Whether they work through charm, deception, or dogged persistence, the Seeker is the warband's primary tool for uncovering the secrets that the enemies of the Imperium would prefer to keep hidden.

Role Aptitudes

Agility, Fellowship, Perception, Social, Tech

Role Talent

Keen Intuition or Nowhere to Hide

Role Bonus

Nothing Escapes My Sight: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Seeker may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed at an Awareness or Inquiry Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Perception Bonus.

specialAbilities.name: Nothing Escapes My Sight
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Seeker may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed at an Awareness or Inquiry Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Perception Bonus.
